## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, performance, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** The final batch of Data Engineering Resource (DER) articles is published. The focus now shifts to the remaining 12 agentic articles and two thought leadership pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [**Agent Use Case Pages:** A wireframe is ready, but the team will research competitors (Composio, Merge) to develop a content-heavy, technical template that avoids an "AI-generated" feel.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Performance:** Agentic articles are driving new audience acquisition (\>1,300 sessions/mo, 1.25x sessions:visitor ratio). The "Context Engineering" cluster dominates, while "Enterprise Agents" underperforms and requires optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [**Tooling:** CheckThat is on track for a soft launch next week, aiming to replace Scrunch and Profound as the primary tool for tracking prompts, competitors, and market context.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Pipeline

  - [**DER Articles:** The final batch of 5 agentic and 6 data engineering articles is published.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [**Thought Leadership:** 2 articles are reviewed and ready; a 3rd is due today.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [The missing replication diagram is now complete.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [**Next Focus:** The remaining 12 agentic articles.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

### Agent Use Case Pages

  - [**Wireframe:** A draft is ready for the "IT Onboarding Agent" use case.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Feedback (Tanmay):**](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [**CTA:** "Deploy your onboarding agent" is too strong for the current stage.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [**Visuals:** Replace placeholder stars with product screenshots.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Content:** Must be technical and content-heavy to provide value and avoid appearing "AI-generated."](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [**Research:** Erik will research competitor pages (Composio, Merge) for inspiration.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Idea (Tanmay):** Experiment with long-form articles for use case keywords to test SEO performance against dedicated pages.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

### Performance & Optimization

  - [**Agentic Article Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [**Traffic:** \>1,300 sessions in January.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [**Audience:** 1.25x sessions:visitor ratio → strong new audience acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [**Engagement:** The "agent data platform" article showed unusually high engagement (73 min), which requires investigation.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [**Cluster Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [**Dominant:** "Context Engineering."](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [**Underperforming:** "Enterprise Agents and Governance & Security" (11.6% engagement).](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
          - [**Action:** Review content for readability and tone to boost engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**GSC Top Performers:** "LLM hallucinations" and "context window limits" articles continue to lead in Google search.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)

### Tooling & Workflow

  - [**Connectors Page Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Problem:** The auto-publish workflow failed for new connectors, as it lacked a "previous state" to compare against.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Fix:** Kirkland implemented a fix in two days.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Result:** New and updated connectors will now auto-publish pages from the GitHub repo.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**CheckThat Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**Goal:** Replace Scrunch and Profound as the primary tool for tracking prompts, competitors, and market context.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
      - [**Status:** Soft launch planned for next week; Marcel will grant access.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**Blocker:** A bug is preventing prompt tracking; Erik is updating prompts manually in the interim.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**Category:** Erik is requesting a change from "ETL" to a more relevant category for market visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tanmay:**](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [Review the agent use case wireframe and research page templates.](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Nithin:**](https://fathom.video/share/nAxBEcJAh-VDJ86Ex9fqBZXimdPAaRVD?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
